name: stylus-nexus
description: Stylus Nexus plugins for Claude Code + Codex.

plugins.name: work-plan
plugins.description: Track-aware daily planning over GitHub issues. Shared tracks (git-synced .work-plan/) optionally pinned to a canonical plan branch (plan-branch; push-track promotes a private track to it), AI clustering (group/auto-triage), coverage, plan-status doc liveness with drift detection, batched GraphQL fetches. Includes a theme-aware, accessible VS Code viewer — sidebar tree with a visibility×tier exposure badge, Mermaid dependency graph, and a Plans view with confirm-gated frontmatter writes (verdict / acknowledge / drift-baseline), track↔plan links, fast-fail GitHub auth, and a gated GitHub issue-close.

plugins.name: defect-scan
plugins.description: Language-aware defect hunter: detect stack -> triage by risk -> run real analyzers (ruff/mypy, tsc/eslint) -> reason with 9 battle-tested patterns (billing, key-drift, audience-leak, subprocess-hygiene, partial-fetch, pagination-cap, mock-only-tests, ETL-data-loss, SQL-schema-drift) -> report (confidence-tiered, gh-issue-correlated) -> fix. Depth-capped, project-local tool resolution.
